meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve Deployment Blocks for Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your first SaaS app from local environment to production.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure is the silent killer of student portfolios. The Antigravity project template eliminates configuration drift by standardizing your environment, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure-as-code. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate the complex handoffs between your local machine and the cloud, turning deployment into a single-command success.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting the perfect logic, debugging edge cases, and perfecting your UI. But when you hit 'deploy,' silence greets you—or worse, a cascade of cryptic error logs. The gap between a working local prototype and a live, scalable application is where most student projects go to die, buried under the weight of environment variables and misconfigured cloud credentials.

It doesn't have to be this way. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural blueprint, abstracting the infrastructure noise so you can focus on building features that matter. Combined with Claude Code, we aren't just writing code; we are orchestrating a production-grade release pipeline that transforms your local workspace into a high-availability cloud environment.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Clone the base template to establish a production-ready folder structure, including pre-configured Dockerfiles and environment schemas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the 'SaaS-Standard' template, including support for PostgreSQL, Redis, and automated environment validation.

steps.title: Configure Infrastructure-as-Code
steps.description: Define your infrastructure requirements within the template to ensure consistent state management across dev and production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Terraform files for a basic AWS ECS deployment, ensuring all security groups and IAM roles follow the principle of least privilege.

steps.title: Establish the CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Integrate automated testing and deployment workflows so that every merge triggers a verified build process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs unit tests, performs a security scan, and builds a Docker image for deployment.

steps.title: Inject Production Secrets Safely
steps.description: Use the template's secure vault mechanism to handle environment variables without exposing them in your codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a secrets management strategy using the template's .env.example and encrypted storage patterns.

steps.title: Execute the First Cloud Deploy
steps.description: Perform the final push to your cloud environment using the automated deployment script provided by the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the deployment validation suite to ensure all services are ready to spin up on the production cluster.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'staging' environment that mirrors production exactly; never test deployment logic in your live app.
Use Claude Code to audit your Dockerfile for 'layer bloating' to significantly decrease your cold-start deployment times.
Implement health-check endpoints early so your infrastructure knows exactly when your app is ready to accept traffic.
Treat your infrastructure code with the same rigor as your application code—version control is your safety net.
Enable automated rollback triggers in your pipeline so that failed deploys automatically revert to the last stable state.
content.next_steps: Once your first deployment is live, monitor your logs for 24 hours and begin implementing feature flags to test new updates without redeploying the entire stack.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student writing code; you are a builder shipping software. By mastering the Antigravity template, you have bypassed the amateur traps that stall most developers' careers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
